PART 2 I USING ABILITY se ORES

data.description: make deductions based on clues, discern hidden details, find objects, locate hidden areas, determine the weakest point in a tunnel that could cause it to collapse, through ancient ruins, and more. Intelligence (Nature) check measures your ability to recall lore about terrain, plants, and animals, while Intelligence (Religion) check measures your ability to recall lore about deities, rites, and prayers.
